text.title: Integration Testing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are drivers present (db_engine_required, commit_time_behavior_under_test, parallel_target, external_http_calls)?

conclusion.verdict: Profile incomplete — return structured error, do not guess defaults.
Use in-memory SQLite via SQLAlchemy; no Docker, no Testcontainers.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND db_engine_required == true AND commit_time_behavior_under_test == true

conclusion.verdict: Use truncate isolation + transaction=True markers (pytest-django) to surface commit-time constraint violations.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND db_engine_required == true AND commit_time_behavior_under_test == false AND external_http_calls == 'many_or_complex'

conclusion.verdict: Use rollback isolation + session-scoped WireMock container.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND db_engine_required == true AND commit_time_behavior_under_test == false AND external_http_calls == 'few' or external_http_calls == 'simple'

conclusion.verdict: Use rollback isolation + respx transport interception.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND db_engine_required == true AND commit_time_behavior_under_test == false AND external_http_calls == 'none'

conclusion.verdict: Use rollback isolation only; no HTTP mocking layer needed.
